Class JsonFluidReadWrite.ComponentData

java.lang.Object
neqsim.thermo.util.readwrite.JsonFluidReadWrite.ComponentData
Enclosing class:
JsonFluidReadWrite
private static class JsonFluidReadWrite.ComponentData extends Object
Internal data holder for a parsed component.
Version:
1.0
Author:
copilot
